Chronology of every recorded fact about [[blood madra]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — The Remnant flickers with blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Blood madra is a type of madra that supposedly holds sinister powers over living bodies.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin once hauled on a rope of blood madra.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — bloodspawn are made of blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Blood madra removes unhealthy tissue and grows more.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Blood madra can break down skin and control the body by tearing it apart.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The young woman's blood madra trickled from her feet across the sand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Blood madra affects living bodies directly.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider's Remnant is made mostly of blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith uses blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The color of blood madra is red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Blood Shadow is composed of blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin uses blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin's techniques will require refining due to the introduction of blood madra.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Blood madra disproportionately affects flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Bloodspawn are constructed from blood madra and the will of the Phoenix.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Blood madra is harder to use for cutting if there is no blood present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — A spirit was Forged of blood madra.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Blood madra can flow up a spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Redmoon Hall is a Netherworld of flashing blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin helps manage the blood madra inside Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin and Lindon were studying blood madra to complete her new Path.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider's Striker technique used blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The red-winged human avatar of the Dreadgod was formed from blood madra.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen can pull javelins of blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — blood madra is used for strengthening muscles in Overlord bodies.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
